policy.clock: fixed inside deterministic capture or bounded by explicit timeout assertion
policy.process_randomness: PID, port and temporary path are asserted at their owning process boundary and excluded from logical DB dumps

points.name: provider_timeout
points.injection: local provider accepts request and delays beyond runtime deadline

points.name: gateway_cancel_after_enqueue
points.injection: router acknowledgement is delayed while cancellation is committed

points.name: session_db_before_restart
points.injection: commands are queued while service is stopped, including malformed and duplicate items

points.name: session_db_interrupted_recovery
points.injection: service exits with running and paused sessions, then restarts

points.name: router_endpoint_replacement
points.injection: first local router is stopped and replaced at the same discovery boundary
